stemHtml: What is the purpose of the oil and the nitrogen in an oleo-pneumatic strut?

options.a: The oil supplies the spring function and the nitrogen supplies the damping function.
options.b: The oil supplies the damping function and the nitrogen supplies the spring function.
options.c: The oil supplies the sealing and lubrification, the nitrogen supplies the damping function.
options.d: The oil supplies the damping and lubrication function, and the nitrogen supplies the heat-dissipation function.
